_doc: Quotes — surface copy for splash, daily-address, empty states, error states, consecration. Locked list per design/shell/05-lore-and-nomenclature.md §4. Anything not in this file needs an amendment to that doc before use.

quotes.text: When a man says yes, his chi says yes also.
A man's chi is one thing and his life-course another.
No man however great was greater than his people; no one ever won judgment against his clan.
The world is like a Mask dancing. If you want to see it well, you do not stand in one place.

quotes.gloss: If one agrees, one's chi agrees.

quotes.text: Aka aja aja na-ebute ọnụ mmanụ mmanụ.
quotes.gloss: Dirty hands bring an oily mouth.
